title: cyclosorus contiguus
intro: Cyclosorus contiguus, also known as the Asian polypody, is a type of fern species commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus contiguus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and improve skin health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tonics, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
